home.hero_subtitle: Ukrainian premium hookah accessories, engineered with the precision of weaponry.
home.about_text: Tactical HB is a Ukrainian premium hookah accessories brand. We combine innovative design inspired by weaponry aesthetics with flawless material quality and craftsmanship.

flagship.title: Tactical Hookah
flagship.subtitle: The device that defines the brand. Military precision, premium materials, uncompromising performance.
flagship.notify_success: Thank you! You'll be the first to know.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Every piece is the result of precise engineering and premium materials.

wholesale.title: Wholesale
wholesale.intro: Tactical HB works with selected partners who value precision, quality, and distinctive design.
wholesale.body: Our accessories are engineered with military-grade attention to detail and finished to a premium standard. We focus on long-term partnerships built on reliable quality, clear communication, and flexible terms.
wholesale.why_1: Distinctive tactical design not found elsewhere in the industry
wholesale.why_2: High manufacturing standards and consistent quality
wholesale.closing: We believe in straightforward, honest cooperation. If you share our standards and are interested in working together, we would be glad to discuss terms.
wholesale.form_message: Tell us about your business and what you're interested in
wholesale.form_success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.
wholesale.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us at Sales.tactical-hb@outlook.com.
wholesale.sales_note: Prefer email? Write to us directly and we'll reply within one business day.

about.title: About Us
about.story_title: Born from a Passion for Hookah
about.story_text_1: Tactical HB began with a simple desire — to elevate the hookah smoking experience to a new level. Our founder, a passionate shisha enthusiast, realised that the accessories available on the market often lacked the quality and uniqueness he was looking for.
about.story_text_2: Drawing inspiration from the striking materials and colours of weaponry, he set out to design, manufacture, and rigorously test products that not only looked special but delivered an unmatched smoking experience.
about.story_text_3: We take immense pride in being a Ukrainian brand. Our products reflect the craftsmanship and dedication that our country is known for.
about.value_1_text: Every product is made in Ukraine from the highest quality materials.
about.value_2_text: Weaponry-inspired aesthetics — unique in the hookah industry worldwide.
about.value_3_text: Aviation aluminium, specialist surface treatment, zero defect rate.
about.value_4_text: Wholesale clients across Europe, USA, and the Middle East.
about.payment_text_1: We accept card payments — Visa and Mastercard — through Plata by Mono (Monobank), and on the secure payment page you can also pay with Apple Pay or Google Pay. Every transaction is handled by a certified payment gateway — your card details travel encrypted and are never stored on our servers.
about.payment_text_2: Checkout takes a few taps and needs no account. You'll receive confirmation by email the moment your payment succeeds, and we begin preparing your order the same working day.
about.payment_note: Prices are shown in hryvnia (₴) for orders within Ukraine and in euro (€) elsewhere.
about.delivery_text_1: Within Ukraine we ship with Nova Poshta and Ukrposhta — to a branch, a parcel locker, or by courier to your door. The delivery cost is calculated at checkout and paid on the website together with your order; it cannot be paid on collection.
about.delivery_text_2: For international orders, delivery can be paid on the website at checkout. If it isn't paid then, we'll send you a separate email with a payment request for shipping — your order is only fully confirmed once that delivery payment is received.
about.returns_title: Thirty days to change your mind
about.returns_intro: If something isn't right, we'll make it right. Any order can be returned within 30 days — no excluded categories, no awkward questions.
about.return_1_text: Return any order within 30 days of the date you received it.
about.return_2_text: The item should be unused and returned complete, in the packaging it arrived in.
about.return_3_text: We keep no list of non-returnable products — everything we sell can be returned.
about.return_4_text: The cost of sending the item back to us is covered by the customer.
about.return_5_text: Email admin@tactical-hb.com with your order number and we'll send return instructions the same day.
about.returns_refund: Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 14 days of us receiving and inspecting the returned item.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.intro: Whether you have a question about our products, are interested in wholesale collaboration, or simply want to get in contact — we're here to help.
contact.response_note: We aim to reply within 24 hours on business days.
contact.form_error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

newsletter.title: Sign up to get news from Tactical HB
newsletter.intro: Receive Tactical HB digital communications, for first access to new releases, drops and stories from the workshop.
newsletter.consent: I agree to receive personalised commercial communications via email. I have read and understood the Privacy Policy.
newsletter.legal: By subscribing you consent to Tactical HB processing your details in order to send you news about our products and offers. We keep your data only for as long as you remain subscribed, and you can withdraw your consent at any time using the unsubscribe form below. To access, correct or delete your data, write to admin@tactical-hb.com.
newsletter.success_body: Thank you for subscribing. You'll be among the first to hear about new Tactical HB releases.
newsletter.unsub_intro: Please enter your email address to unsubscribe from Tactical HB's digital communications.
newsletter.unsub_success: You've been unsubscribed. You will no longer receive our emails.
newsletter.err_required: Please fill in all mandatory fields.
newsletter.err_email: Please enter a valid email address.
newsletter.err_match: The two email addresses don't match.
newsletter.err_consent: Please accept the communications consent to continue.
newsletter.promo: to receive Tactical HB updates and be the first to know about new releases.
